name: Whitney Houston
title: Whitney Houston - taken 2/10/2012 died the next day on 2/11/2012, 48
description: Whitney Houston - taken 2/10/2012 died the next day on 2/11/2012, 48
bio: Whitney Houston was an American singer and actress, one of the best-selling music artists of all time. Known as "The Voice", her powerful vocals and hits like "I Will Always Love You" made her a global superstar.
